creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
alepulver    2006-11-08 00:52:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-themes           Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-themes/murrine-configurator Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    x11-themes/murrine-configurator/files patch-aa 
  Log:
  A gui gtkrc configuration tool for the Murrine GTK engine.
  
  Murrine Configurator gives users the opportunity to configure all the Murrine
  Engine style options.  The usage is very simple and the dialogs explain step
  by step the style options you can edit.
  
  WWW:   http://cimi.netsons.org/pages/murrine/configurator.php
  
  PR:             ports/105076
  Submitted by:   Ted Stodgell <tstodgell at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.173     +1 -0      ports/x11-themes/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/x11-themes/murrine-configurator/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-themes/murrine-configurator/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11-themes/murrine-configurator/files/patch-aa (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/x11-themes/murrine-configurator/pkg-descr (new)
